generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values national security, I'm glad to see our leaders taking proactive steps to strengthen domestic security powers. The recent proposals aren't about restricting freedoms - they're about giving law enforcement the tools they need to stay ahead of evolving threats. We can't afford to be reactive in today's world. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurNation
